title: Avocado Mash
description: Freshly mashed ripe avocado with lime juice, garlic, and cumin. Simple, healthy, and delicious.

ingredients.note: must yield fully to gentle pressure
or ½ small garlic clove, minced to paste

steps.instruction: Halve and pit avocados. Scoop flesh into a bowl.
Mash with a fork to desired consistency — smooth or slightly chunky as you prefer.
Add lime juice, garlic, cumin, and salt. Mix well.
If adding tomato: seed and skin the tomato first. Dice flesh and fold in gently.
If adding cilantro: use leaves only, minced finely — no stems.
Taste and adjust seasoning. Press plastic wrap directly onto the surface to prevent browning if not serving immediately.

notes: Only use avocados that are fully ripe (soft to the touch). Under-ripe avocados are firm and won't mash properly.
